name: github_create_or_update_org_actions_secret
description: Create or update an organization GitHub Actions secret (PUT /orgs/{org}/actions/secrets/{secret_name}). Provide plaintext value; the tool fetches the org public key and encrypts it with LibSodium. visibility (all|private|selected) is required; selected_repository_ids only when visibility is selected. Classic tokens need admin:org scope (plus repo for private repos). HTTP 201 created / 204 updated. See GitHub REST Actions secrets.
